title: Sunday Dinner for a Soldier
writer: Martha Cheavens, Wanda Tuchock, Melvin Levy
actors: Anne Baxter, Charles Winninger, John Hodiak
plot: A poor family in Florida saves all the money they can in order to plan something special for the soldier they've invited to Sunday dinner. They don't realize that their request to invite the soldier never got mailed. On the day of...
